impact: This advances the PP&D plan by adding deterministic, citation-backed validation for a DevHub online trade permit purchase workflow without live crawl, authentication, payment, submission, cancellation, or inspection scheduling automation.
summary: Add fixture-only guardrail compiler coverage for online trade permit purchase stop points and missing facts.
target_task: Task checkbox-124: Add guardrail compiler fixture tests for the online trade permit purchase workflow covering missing facts, required license or contractor facts, payment stop points, inspection-scheduling stop points, cancellation/finalization stop points, and citation-backed action gates using only fixture data.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
